name: razor
description: YAGNI enforcement at the harness level for real engineering work — nudges toward the simplest solution and gates against unnecessary dependencies, file sprawl, and unchecked build growth.

file_budget.title: New-file budget per turn
file_budget.description: New files allowed in one turn before razor asks whether existing files already cover it. 0 disables the check.

search_budget.title: Post-edit search budget
search_budget.description: Extra searches allowed after the code is written before razor asks whether the question is already answered. 0 disables the check.

dep_guard.title: Dependency guard (installs)
dep_guard.description: One forced reconsideration before a command installs a new dependency.

import_guard.title: Dependency guard (imports)
import_guard.description: One forced reconsideration before code imports a package that isn't in the project manifest.

manifest_guard.title: Dependency guard (manifest edits)
manifest_guard.description: One forced reconsideration before an edit adds a new package to package.json or requirements.txt directly.

ledger.title: End-of-session build check
ledger.description: One "is all of this needed?" question when a session adds a lot of code with almost no deletions.
